mapper.select: WITH claimed AS ( UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'PROCESSING', claimed_at = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), claimed_by = #{workerId} WHERE (oeid, created_at) IN ( SELECT oeid, created_at FROM outbox_event WHERE status = 'NEW' AND created_at <= #{tSafe, typeHandler=com.dogancaglar.common.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) RETURNING * ) SELECT * FROM claimed
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'NEW', claimed_at = NULL, claimed_by = NULL WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND claimed_at < ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - (#{olderThanSeconds} || ' seconds')::interval)

UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'SENT', updated_at = now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', claimed_at = NULL, claimed_by = NULL WHERE oeid = #{oeid} AND created_at = #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.dogancaglar.common.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}
